research_goal: Run one continuous read-only walkthrough of Clink UAT dashboard after a single login, covering analytics, transactions, balances, customers, subscriptions, products, developers or skills, and settings. Stay inside Clink first-party pages, avoid destructive actions and external links, and return partial findings for blocked sections.

products.name: Clink UAT Dashboard
products.notes: Continuous read-only UAT walkthrough. Use one browser session. Login once if required, then keep the authenticated session while visiting sections. Do not open GitHub, external documentation, payment-provider, support, or app-store links; only note visible labels or URLs. Do not copy or reveal full API keys, tokens, passwords, or private values. If secrets are visible, note the risk without including the values.

scenarios.title: Complete read-only Clink dashboard walkthrough in one browser session
scenarios.persona: Product manager validating product information architecture, operational visibility, and admin safety
scenarios.goal: Assess the main authenticated dashboard surfaces in one continuous browser-use run without repeating login for every section.
steps: Open the analytics URL and sign in with the provided safe credentials if redirected to login
Inspect the authenticated analytics overview: navigation, active page label, metric cards, charts, date controls, filters, loading states, and empty states
Open Data Insights or Core Metrics and inspect metric selectors, chart controls, and date-range affordances
Open Transactions and inspect list or empty state, columns, filters, statuses, pagination, and safe read-only detail affordances if clearly available
Open Balances, Customers, and Subscriptions and inspect visible read-only information, search/filter affordances, and empty-state guidance
Open Products and inspect catalog/list structure, filters, status, tabs, and visible safe controls without using create, edit, archive, or export actions
Open Developers or Skills and inspect setup copy, API/key warnings, docs link labels, and secret handling without copying values or opening external links
Open Settings and inspect visible category labels or overview panels without editing, disabling, adding, or saving configuration
Return a section-by-section JSON-like summary with completed_sections, blocked_sections, friction_points, notable_copy, urls_seen, evidence_needed, and top_recommendations
success_criteria: The run uses one continuous browser session rather than repeated independent logins
Authenticated dashboard navigation and major product sections are inspected when accessible
No destructive action, payment, account mutation, export, secret reveal/copy, or settings change is performed
External documentation, GitHub, support, app-store, and provider links are not opened
Blocked sections are clearly reported with evidence needed rather than retried indefinitely
